CustomField.description: No mandatory rental amenity fee are allowed by affordable housing rules. Options are: 1. no charge for use of amenities by affordable tenants. 2. There is an optional $xxx (monthly or annual or 1 time) amenity fee for use of community amenities 3. N/A because there are no amenities
CustomField.inlineHelpText: No mandatory rental amenity fee allowed by affordable housing rules. Options are: 1. no charge for use of amenities by affordable tenants. 2. There is an optional $xxx (monthly or annual or 1 time) amenity fee for use of community amenities 3. N/A
CustomField.label: Amenity Fee
